title: Phase 5 index-first baseline
rationale: Applied targeted query-path indexes plus advisor-driven FK covering indexes; captured post-change EXPLAIN snapshots and lint deltas for later high-volume validation.

name: Snapshot table policy tuning
description: Split service-role ALL policies into write-only policies and added missing FK indexes to remove multiple_permissive_policies and unindexed_foreign_keys advisor warnings.

name: Phase 6 baseline follow-up
description: Performance baseline notes now reflect that branch-scoped snapshot aggregates were implemented in Phase 6 and are scheduled via pg_cron.
